title: Sales Manager Vacancy at RMZ Corp - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at RMZ Corp - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
